tagline: The AI-powered back-of-bar operating system that tells you exactly where your money is going — before you lose it.
problem: Bars lose 15–25% of revenue to shrinkage (over-pouring, theft, spillage, miscounting). BarGuard automates loss detection by comparing what should have been used (from sales data + recipes) vs. what actually remains (from physical counts).

ai: Anthropic Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 (invoice scanning, variance analysis, profit insights)

inventory_management.description: Track and count all bar inventory
capabilities: Track spirits, beer (bottles/kegs/packs), wine, and food items
Mobile-friendly physical stock count screen
Partial bottle tracking with visual fill gauge and shot estimator
Color-coded staleness indicators (fresh / aging / stale / never counted)
Reorder level alerts — get notified before running out
Bulk CSV upload for inventory counts
Filter by category (spirits, beer, wine, mixer, food)

ai_invoice_scanning.description: Upload any purchase invoice and AI extracts everything
capabilities: Upload invoice images (JPG, PNG, WebP) or PDFs
Claude AI extracts vendor name, purchase date, and all line items
Automatic pack type detection (6-pack, 12-pack, case, keg)
Confidence indicators per line item (high / medium / low)
Manual review and edit before confirming
Auto-learns vendor product names over time via alias system
Draft history — re-review past uploads

sales_data_integration.description: Pull in sales from any POS or CSV
capabilities: Full OAuth flow for Square, Clover, Lightspeed
Credentials-based auth for Toast
CSV import for any unsupported POS
Station/register filtering (Bar 1, Bar 2, Kitchen, etc.)
Full sales log with date-range filtering
Per-item revenue breakdowns
Sync logs with transaction counts and error tracking

loss_detection_and_variance.description: Automatically detect where inventory is going missing
capabilities: Compares expected usage (sales × recipes) vs. actual (inventory counts)
Shift-based analysis: Morning, Afternoon, Dinner, Late Night, or custom window
Severity levels: critical (>20% variance), warning (10–19%), normal (<10%)
Dollar-value loss estimate per item
KPI dashboard: critical items count, warnings, health score (0–100)
Highest-risk item banner with dollar impact
AI plain-English briefing: what's off, probable causes, recommended actions
Margin % and profit per drink and food item
7-day, 30-day, monthly, or custom date ranges
Identifies highest-margin winners and weakest-margin items
AI highlights pricing opportunities and waste patterns
Volume vs. profit analysis
Separate drink and food performance views

menu_and_recipe_management.description: Build and cost out every item on the menu
capabilities: Create drinks and food items with sell price and category
Define recipes with exact ingredients and quantities
AI auto-suggests ingredients from menu item name
Cost-per-drink calculation from inventory item costs
Bartender-facing drink library (searchable, mobile-friendly)
Bulk recipe import

data_management.description: Keep messy data clean and mapped
capabilities: Alias system maps raw CSV/POS names to correct inventory items
Bulk CSV import for inventory counts, purchases, and sales
Draft review workflow — nothing posts without confirmation
Visual progress tracker for unresolved aliases

ai_features.invoice_scanning: Claude vision reads any purchase invoice and extracts structured line items
ai_features.variance_analysis: After each count session, AI flags discrepancies with probable causes (over-pouring, theft, spillage, miscounting, vendor short-ships) and numbered next steps
ai_features.profit_insights: Claude analyzes full menu profitability and surfaces the single most actionable focus area for the manager this week

platform.multi_tenant: Each bar has its own isolated workspace
platform.responsive: Fully mobile-optimized — works on phone, tablet, desktop
platform.security: Supabase Row-Level Security (RLS), middleware route protection, encrypted POS credentials
